{{Quote|Following the death of their Jedi watchman, the Mid Rim world of Cadinth is wavering in its loyalty to the Republic.|"Cadinth Loyalty Uncertain After Jedi Death"|<ref name="Article" />}}
'''Bodis-Ker Vitan''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and the [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Cadinth]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Cadinth supported the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="Article" /> against a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|militant secessionist faction]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> but by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="22 BBY" /> a pro-Separatist [[Saskapeg uprising|uprising]] broke out in the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Saskapeg]], leading to Vitan's [[Death/Legends|death]]. The [[Cadinth Oligarchy]] subsequently withdrew its previous support of the Republic, with [[Prime Oligarch]] [[Rankwin Fopow]] later revoking previous decrees and declaring that the planet was "firmly undecided" between the two groups.<ref name="Article" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bodis-Ker Vitan was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 55|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #55'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="Article" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[May 9]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN55 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6774521|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-09|time=4:55 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220611192020/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-14}}</ref>
